title: halmia tomentosa
intro: Halmia tomentosa, also known as the woolly halmia or halmia, is a plant species within the family Apocynaceae. It is native to tropical regions and has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Halmia tomentosa include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, and aiding in digestion. Herbal preparations of Halmia tomentosa include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments.
